metadata.title: Global Agentic OS Dashboard
metadata.sourcePolicy: Local folder mode. Status cross-checked against product-repo git history on 2026-05-31: RunSmart iOS submitted; Resumely iOS PostHog integrated (PR #35 into #36) + UX transformation shipped.

summary.overallStatus: RunSmart iOS is submitted to App Store review. Resumely iOS cleared its last analytics gate: PostHog is now integrated (PR #35 merged into the PR #36 UX transformation) with a PII guard and event de-dup, so the focus shifts to ASC credentials and a real-device smoke test before submit.
summary.bestNextAction: RunSmart iOS: monitor App Store review and prep the 1.0.1 fast-follow UX redesign spec. Resumely iOS: set up Fastlane / ASC API key, run a real-device smoke test, then submit for review.
mainBlockers: RunSmart iOS: in App Store review (24 to 48h ETA); next work is the 1.0.1 fast-follow, not a blocker.
Resumely iOS: no local Fastlane config / ASC API key. Screenshot + metadata upload needs manual setup.
Resumely iOS: real-device smoke test with a live account not yet run.
Resumely iOS: Resume Library backend (/api/v1/resumes) not live; mock service active.
needsDecision: RunSmart 1.0.1: confirm scope of the fast-follow UX redesign spec before building.
Resumely iOS: Fastlane / ASC credentials setup (founder action required).

projects.name: RunSmart iOS
projects.role: Primary premium mobile running coach product.
projects.status: Submitted to App Store review. Build 6 uploaded, portal close-out done. E7 Striver-gated Garmin 7-day HRV and readiness trends shipped. A 1.0.1 fast-follow UX redesign spec is now drafted.
projects.distributionStatus: Submitted for review; awaiting Apple. 1.0.1 fast-follow UX spec drafted
projects.currentPhase: In App Store review; planning 1.0.1 fast-follow
projects.activeStory: Monitor App Store review; scope the 1.0.1 fast-follow UX redesign spec
projects.lastCompletedStory: Submitted build 6; E7 Wearable Depth (Garmin HRV + readiness trends, PR #36); archive script + release fixes; readiness test fixes
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Confirm 1.0.1 UX redesign scope; wire run_started + run_completed activation events
projects.lastValidation: GPS QA run 2: 9.10 km 2026-05-30 PASS (1,432 GPS pts, 7% battery drain). Focused tests green: StriverPersonaGateTests 3/3, WellnessTrendMapperTests 4/4, FlexWeekCacheTests 4/4.
projects.validationState: QA passed; build submitted to Apple.
blockers: In App Store review: outcome depends on Apple (no agent action available).
Garmin freshness Story 4 (webhook audit) is backend/human investigation.
risks: App Store approval delay or rejection
Garmin webhook subscription health not yet audited

analyticsStatus.note: Activation funnel not yet fully visible. run_started and run_completed are the highest-value missing events.

nextActions: Monitor App Store review status; respond to any Apple feedback.
Scope and confirm the 1.0.1 fast-follow UX redesign spec before building.
Wire run_started + run_completed activation events for funnel visibility.

projects.name: Resumely iOS
projects.role: Native iOS app for Resumely resume optimization product.
projects.status: Pre-submission, analytics gate cleared. PostHog integrated via AnalyticsService (PR #35 merged into the PR #36 UX transformation), with a PII guard and event de-dup. Guest-first home activation flow shipped. Remaining gates: ASC credentials and a real-device smoke test.
projects.currentPhase: Pre-submission sprint — ASC credentials + smoke test
projects.activeStory: Set up Fastlane / ASC API key; run a real-device smoke test with a live account; then submit
projects.lastCompletedStory: PostHog integration (Story 2, PR #35); PR #36 UX transformation; PII guard + double-fire fix; guest-first home activation; rb-aso-002 screenshots; 55/55 tests
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Set up Fastlane ASC API key, run real-device smoke test, submit for review
projects.lastValidation: test_sim 55/55 passing 2026-05-26. Analytics PII guard + de-dup landed (commit ec978aa). rb-aso-002 screenshots rendered 2026-05-28.
projects.validationState: Build, tests, and analytics passing. Real-device smoke test with live account not done.
blockers: No local Fastlane config / ASC API key. App Store Connect upload requires manual setup.
Real-device smoke test with a live account not completed.
Resume Library backend (/api/v1/resumes) not live; mock service active.
risks: WKWebView PDF render fragility on real device
Backend Resume Library not yet live

analyticsStatus.note: PostHog integrated via AnalyticsService (PR #35 into #36). PII guard + double-fire fix landed (ec978aa). Confirm full event coverage and export_success against the live optimize/export flow.

nextActions: Set up Fastlane / ASC API key (founder action) to enable screenshot + metadata upload.
Run a real-device smoke test with a live account across optimize, design, expert, preview, export.
Submit Resumely for App Store review.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.role: Cross-project coordination for tasks, context, specs, QA, workflows, and agents.
projects.status: Future orchestration concept. Do not build before the workflow is proven manually.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Keep manual workflow lightweight; automate only after repeated patterns are proven.

projects.validationState: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
blockers: Manual orchestration workflow not yet proven enough to automate.
risks: Replacing local project truth with stale global summaries
nextActions: Use the Global Agentic OS dashboard as a manual coordination layer.
Keep local project repos as source of truth.
Record repeatable workflows before building Atlas automation.

qaBoard.buildStatus: Simulator build clean; all focused tests green.
qaBoard.appStoreReadiness: Portal close-out remaining (human-only). No agent gate open.
qaBoard.missingValidation: ASC portal close-out (human): select build, upload screenshots, enter credentials, submit.

qaBoard.manualQAStatus: Real-device smoke test with live account not done.
qaBoard.appStoreReadiness: Analytics gate cleared (PostHog integrated). Remaining: ASC credentials + real-device smoke test before submit.
qaBoard.missingValidation: ASC credentials / Fastlane setup, real-device smoke test, confirm export_success event.

top3: RunSmart iOS: monitor App Store review; scope the 1.0.1 fast-follow UX redesign.
Resumely iOS: set up ASC credentials, run real-device smoke test, then submit.
Activation funnels: wire RunSmart run_started/run_completed and confirm Resumely export_success.
openDecisions: Resumely iOS Fastlane / ASC credentials setup (founder action)
executiveBoard.financialSnapshot: Needs Data — no revenue/cost instrumentation wired.
executiveBoard.note: EXD-002 (analytics scope) and the PostHog-before-submit call are now resolved: PostHog is integrated in both apps. See executive-os/EXECUTIVE-DASHBOARD.md for the full Executive Intelligence OS view.

decisionBoard.whyItMatters: A UX redesign spec is drafted; locking scope now keeps the fast-follow small and shippable while v1.0 is in review.
decisionBoard.options: Ship the full redesign spec / cherry-pick the highest-impact screens / hold until v1.0 review outcome
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Cherry-pick the highest-impact screens for 1.0.1; defer the rest to 1.1.

decisionBoard.decision: Resumely iOS Fastlane / ASC credentials setup
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Screenshots and metadata cannot be uploaded without credentials; manual ASC web upload is slow and error-prone.
decisionBoard.options: Fastlane with ASC API key / manual upload in ASC web UI
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Set up Fastlane with ASC API key (founder action).

decisionBoard.decision: Resumely iOS: confirm PostHog event coverage before submit
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: PostHog is integrated, but export_success coverage is unconfirmed; the export step is the core conversion event.
decisionBoard.options: Verify export_success now / submit and verify post-launch
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Verify export_success against the live export flow before submit.
